news.title: India, US to hold ministerial-level trade pact talks this week
news.description: Ministers from both nations aim to finalise key aspects of the interim trade agreement, addressing tariff structures and market competitiveness ahead of a pivotal deadline for US trade policies

news.title: India, US to hold ministerial-level talks on bilateral trade pact this week

news.title: Bullion Cues: Gold and silver futures might drop further
news.description: Gold and silver futures face potential declines, with bearish trends suggesting further drops in prices ahead.

news.title: 金饰克价一夜又跌11元
news.description: 6月20日，国内黄金饰品价格对比显示，多家黄金珠宝品牌公布的境内足金首饰价格较昨日有所下调，老凤祥报价1258元/克，较前一日下降7元；老庙黄金报价1268元/克，较前一日下降11元；周生生报价1263元/克，较前一日下降9元；周大福报价1261元/克，较前一日下降11元。据了解，今年1月29日，国内金饰品牌价格曾达到年内阶段性高点，周生生、老庙黄金、老凤祥当日的金饰克价分别为1708元、1722
